series_metadata.series_title: CIGARETTES SOLD TO ANOTHER OHIO LICENSED WHOLESALER
series_metadata.series_description: Monthly reports, supporting schedules and related documentation that report stamped and unstamped cigarettes sold to another Ohio licensed wholesaler.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: end of calendar year or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year. ; Electronic: Delete end of calendar year or such time as diligent enforcement inquiry is resolved a particular year
